checkout.title: Complete Your Purchase

cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel.description: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?

cancel.immediateWarning: Warning: You will immediately lose access to all premium features. This action cannot be undone.

seats.title: Seat Management
seats.maxSeats: Maximum {max} seats allowed on your plan
seats.proratedNote: You will be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing period.
seats.upgradeToAddSeats: Upgrade to a paid plan to add more seats

cycleSwitch.title: Billing Cycle
cycleSwitch.description: Switch between monthly and yearly billing. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.
cycleSwitch.pendingChange: Your billing will switch from {from} to {to} on {date}.
cycleSwitch.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to switch from {from} to {to} billing? This change will take effect at the end of your current billing period.

general.title: General Settings
general.sessionDescription: Sign out from your current session on this device.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
language.selectHint: This will change the language across the entire application.

organizationDetails.title: Organization Details
organizationDetails.slugHint: The slug cannot be changed after creation

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Once you delete an organization, there is no going back. Please be certain.

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage who has access to this organization
members.noMembers: No members found. Invite someone to get started.
members.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this member?

removeDialog.title: Remove Member
removeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the organization? They will lose access to all organization resources.

members.failedToInvite: Failed to invite member. Please check the email and try again.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke Invitation
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation? The recipient will no longer be able to join the organization.

members.alreadyMember: This user is already a member of the organization
members.pendingExists: A pending invitation already exists for this email
members.noSeats: No available seats in your current plan. Please add more seats or upgrade your plan to invite new members.
members.subscriptionFrozen: Your subscription has expired. Please renew your subscription to invite members.

agentConfig.title: Agent Configuration
agentConfig.description: Configure default runtime settings for AI agents. Credentials are managed in personal settings.
agentConfig.configureHint: Set default configuration values for this agent. These values will be used when creating new pods.
agentConfig.configureHintGraphical: Set default runtime parameters for this agent. These values will be used when creating new pods.
agentConfig.credentialsMovedNotice: API credentials have been moved to Personal Settings > Agent Credentials. Each user manages their own credentials.
agentConfig.noConfigFields: No configuration options available for this agent

credentials.title: API Credentials
credentials.description: Configure API credentials for this agent. Defaults to RunnerHost mode (uses Runner's local environment configuration).

runtime.title: Runtime Configuration
runtime.description: Set default runtime parameters for this agent. These settings will be used when creating new pods.

permissionMode.label: Permission Mode
permissionMode.description: Default permission mode for new pods

mcpEnabled.label: Enable MCP
mcpEnabled.description: Enable Model Context Protocol for enhanced collaboration

credentials.title: Your Credentials
credentials.description: Set your personal API keys for AI providers. Keys are encrypted before storage.
credentials.enterAtLeastOne: Please enter at least one API key to save
credentials.failedToSave: Failed to save credentials. Please try again.

agentCredentials.title: Agent Credentials
agentCredentials.description: Manage API credentials for each agent. By default, RunnerHost mode is used (credentials from Runner's local environment). Add custom profiles to use your own API keys.
agentCredentials.runnerHostHint: Use Runner machine's local environment configuration (no credentials injected)
agentCredentials.customProfileDescription: Add your own API credentials for this agent. These will override the Runner's local environment configuration.
agentCredentials.name: Profile Name
agentCredentials.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?
agentCredentials.secretEditHint: Leave empty to keep the existing value

sshKeys.title: SSH Keys
sshKeys.description: Manage SSH keys for Git authentication
sshKeys.noKeys: No SSH keys configured. Add one to use SSH Git providers.
sshKeys.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this SSH key?

dialog.createdHint: Add this public key to your Git server:
dialog.privateKeyPlaceholder:
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
...
-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
dialog.privateKeyHint: Leave empty to generate a new Ed25519 key pair automatically.

billingPage.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. Please try again.

usagePage.title: Token Usage
usagePage.description: Monitor token consumption across your organization
usagePage.loadFailed: Failed to load token usage data

notifications.title: Push Notifications
notifications.description: Configure push notifications for important events like pod status changes, ticket assignments, and runner alerts.
notifications.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
notifications.enabled: You will receive notifications for important events
notifications.disabled: Enable to receive notifications about pods, tickets, and more
notifications.blockedHint: Please enable notifications in your browser settings to receive alerts.
notifications.podStatusDesc: When a pod completes, fails, or changes status
notifications.ticketAssignedDesc: When a ticket is assigned to you
notifications.ticketUpdatedDesc: When tickets you're watching are updated
notifications.runnerOfflineDesc: When a runner goes offline or has issues
notifications.channelMessageDesc: New messages in channels you're a member of
notifications.channelMentionDesc: When someone mentions you in a channel
notifications.taskCompletedDesc: When an agent finishes its task

runnersSection.title: Runners
runnersSection.noRunners: No runners registered. Use a registration token to add runners.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Runner
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this runner? This action cannot be undone.

tokenDialog.title: Registration Token
tokenDialog.description: Copy this token now. You won't be able to see it again. Use this token with 'runner register' command.

gitSettings.title: Git Settings
gitSettings.description: Manage your Git credentials and repository providers for importing and accessing repositories.
gitSettings.confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete this repository provider?

defaultCredential.title: Default Git Credential
defaultCredential.description: Choose the default credential to use for Git operations. This will be used when creating new pods.
defaultCredential.runnerLocalHint: Uses the Git configuration on the Runner machine

providers.title: Repository Providers

providers.empty: No repository providers configured. Add one to import repositories.

dialog.title: Add Git Credential
dialog.name: Name

gitConnections.title: Git Connections
gitConnections.description: Manage your Git provider connections. OAuth connections are automatically created when you sign in with GitHub, GitLab, or Gitee.
gitConnections.oauthCannotDelete: OAuth connections cannot be deleted. Please manage them from your account settings.
gitConnections.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
gitConnections.noOauthConnections: No OAuth connections. Sign in with GitHub, GitLab, or Gitee to automatically connect.
gitConnections.personalDescription: Connections using Personal Access Tokens or SSH keys
gitConnections.noPersonalConnections: No personal connections. Add a connection to access private Git providers.

dialog.title: Add Git Connection
dialog.selectProvider: Select a Git provider to connect:

dialog.gitlabDescription: Connect to GitLab.com or self-hosted GitLab
dialog.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields
dialog.enterPat: Please enter your Personal Access Token

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for third-party service integrations
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to allow third-party services to access your organization's resources.

createDialog.title: Create API Key
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this key used for?
createDialog.scopePodsReadDesc: List and view pod details, status, and logs
createDialog.scopePodsWriteDesc: Create, terminate, and manage pod lifecycle
createDialog.scopeTicketsReadDesc: List and view tickets, board, and ticket details
createDialog.scopeTicketsWriteDesc: Create, update, delete tickets and change status
createDialog.scopeChannelsReadDesc: List channels, view details, and read messages
createDialog.scopeChannelsWriteDesc: Create, update channels, and send messages
createDialog.scopeRunnersReadDesc: List runners, view details, status, and runner pods
createDialog.scopeReposReadDesc: List repositories, view details, branches, and merge requests
createDialog.scopeLoopsReadDesc: List loops, view details, and run history
createDialog.scopeLoopsWriteDesc: Trigger loop runs and cancel running loops

secretDialog.title: API Key Created
secretDialog.description: Copy your API key now. You won't be able to see it again.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API Key
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? Any services using it will lose access immediately.

deleteDialog.title: Delete API Key
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this API key? This action cannot be undone.
